title: Bridge Essay: The evolutionary origin of psychosis.
concept: Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

**The evolutionary origin of psychosis.** - Front Psychiatry (2023). DOI: 10.3389/fpsyt.2023.1115929. PMID: 36741116. Imagination, the driving force of creativity, and primary psychosis are human-specific, since we do not observe behaviors in other species that would convincingly suggest they possess the same traits. Both these traits have been linked to the function of the prefrontal cortex, which is the most evolutionarily novel region of the human brain. A number of evolutionarily novel genetic and epigenetic changes that determine the human brain-specific structure and function have been discovered in recen
